children.text: These industrial-grade cut-resistant gloves are engineered to meet the operational demands of environments requiring consistent mechanical protection and high durability. The glove shell is manufactured using HPPE high-tenacity synthetic fibers, providing a balanced combination of tensile strength, abrasion resistance, and flexibility. The knit construction minimizes structural weak points and ensures uniform protection across the entire glove surface, while maintaining breathability for prolonged wear. The palm and finger areas are coated with a foam nitrile formulation, selected for its proven resistance to hydrocarbons , light oils , and general industrial pollutants. The sandy coating texture enhances tactile response, enabling reliable grip performance on dry and slightly oily surfaces. This coating demonstrates excellent resistance to degradation, maintaining consistent performance across extended usage cycles. The back of the gloves is made from TPR (Thermoplastic Rubber) , offering additional protection against impact and abrasion, while maintaining flexibility and comfort during use. The TPR back provides extra protection for high-risk areas without sacrificing the overall flexibility of the glove. The gloves are tested and certified to ANSI/ISEA Cut Level A5 , providing a quantified level of protection against medium cut hazards . This rating confirms the glove’s ability to withstand standardized blade-contact forces in compliance with ANSI/ISEA testing protocol. The HPPE composite structure further contributes to improved cut resistance by distributing force impact across the fiber matrix. A straight-thumb ergonomic configuration is incorporated to optimize natural hand alignment and reduce rotational stress during repetitive handling tasks. The knit cuff design ensures fully enclosed wrist coverage, preventing particulate ingress and maintaining secure glove positioning during dynamic movements. The product is finished in yellow , a neutral tone chosen to minimize visual wear and maintain a clean appearance in industrial workplaces. These gloves are particularly suited for applications including but not limited to: assembly , material handling , maintenance , and general industrial applications. The gloves are constructed with 13-gauge knit for optimal flexibility and durability, making them suitable for a wide range of tasks without sacrificing comfort or protection. Overall, the combination of a high-performance fiber base, foam nitrile coating , TPR back , and ANSI-certified cut protection establishes these gloves as a robust and dependable solution for professionals requiring consistent hand safety and operational reliability.

The knit construction minimizes structural weak points and ensures uniform protection across the entire glove surface, while maintaining breathability for prolonged wear. The palm and finger areas are coated with a smooth PU formulation, selected for its proven resistance to general industrial pollutants . The coating enhances tactile response, enabling reliable grip performance on dry and slightly oily surfaces. This coating demonstrates excellent resistance to degradation, maintaining consistent performance across extended usage cycles. The gloves are tested and certified to ANSI/ISEA Cut Level A4 , providing a quantified level of protection against high cut hazards . This rating confirms the glove’s ability to withstand standardized blade-contact forces in compliance with ANSI/ISEA testing protocol. The HPPE composite structure further contributes to improved cut resistance by distributing force impact across the fiber matrix. A straight thumb style ergonomic configuration is incorporated to optimize natural hand alignment and reduce rotational stress during repetitive handling tasks. The knit cuff design ensures fully enclosed wrist coverage, preventing particulate ingress and maintaining secure glove positioning during dynamic movements. The product is finished in pink , a neutral tone chosen to minimize visual wear and maintain a clean appearance in industrial workplaces. These gloves are particularly suited for applications including but not limited to: assembly work , maintenance , handling sharp objects , and general industrial tasks. The gloves are constructed with 21-gauge knit for optimal flexibility and durability, making them suitable for a wide range of tasks without sacrificing comfort or protection. Overall, the combination of a high-performance fiber base, smooth PU coating, and ANSI-certified cut protection establishes these gloves as a robust and dependable solution for professionals requiring consistent hand safety and operational reliability.
